identity_baseline: Fifteen-foot-tall, four-armed humanoids with olive-green skin.
movement_language: Highly disciplined and organized; precise in warfare.
stable_visual_summary: The martian_warriors are a group of massive, fifteen-foot-tall humanoids characterized by olive-green skin and blood-red eyes. They possess a unique four-armed anatomy, with two arms positioned on the upper torso. Their appearance is defined by a highly disciplined military presence, utilizing long spears alongside advanced white metal and hard wood radium-projectile rifles during precise warfare operations.
costume_signature: Equipped with long spears and white metal/hard wood radium-projectile rifles.
distinguishing_features: Four arms (two on the upper torso)
continuity_constraints: Must maintain the four-arm anatomical structure.
Weaponry must include both spears and radium-projectile rifles (white metal/hard wood).
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific age range of individuals within the group is unknown.
Exact scale of mass/proportions beyond height is unstated.
